name: orchestrator-agent
description: 大总管 Agent – 统一调度与协调六个垂直领域 Agent（选品、供应商背调、文档财务、Listing广告、SEO+GEO、运营自动化）。用户自然语言输入，自动拆解任务、分发执行、收集结果并生成综合报告。
author: ChinaOS

dependencies.notes: All six sub-agents must be present in the same skills directory for full functionality. The orchestrator will automatically discover them via their skill.json files.

ORCHESTRATOR_PARALLEL.description: Enable parallel execution of independent sub-tasks. Set to 'true' to allow concurrency (max 5 parallel agents).

ORCHESTRATOR_CRON.description: Cron schedule for automatically executing a predefined workflow. Format: '分 时 日 月 周' (e.g., '0 9 * * *' for daily 9 AM). Requires a saved workflow template.

ORCHESTRATOR_WEBHOOK.description: URL to send completion callbacks via HTTP POST (JSON payload with task_id, status, report_url).

ORCHESTRATOR_MAX_RETRIES.description: Maximum number of retries for a failed sub-agent call.

examples: Analyze the market for portable blender, then find 3 suppliers, and finally generate an Amazon listing.
Run my weekly operational check: hijacking monitoring, price tracking, and daily sales report.
Optimise my existing article for AI search engines and create 50 location pages.
If product selection score is above 80, continue with supplier discovery; otherwise stop and tell me to abandon.
